_doc: Stage 02 gutter-split ground truth. Each entry: expected gutter column (x, in original 4000-wide anchor pixels) and a pixel tolerance, OR {"single": true} for a genuine single page. gutter_x-near-GT is a STAGE-02 PROXY for the real consequence (cross-gutter reading-order scramble, which is downstream at Stage 04); a hit means the two facing pages are cleanly separated. Provenance: flat spreads anchored to the known-good ink-valley split column (visually validated, Gate-1/3 era); the three curved spreads (de_01/de_02 and the out-of-testset taleb_bg) hand-labelled from the visible spine in the debug overlay, INDEPENDENT of the pinch detector they validate. de_* anchors are the orientation-normalized landscape (orient_fix jobs). Append-only per testset/README.md.
_tol_note: tol is generous (~3-5% of width): the 2*margin cut overlap absorbs sub-tolerance error, so the metric only flags gross mis-splits, not pixel drift.
